## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `style` — Code style (formatting, no logic change)
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `chore` — Build process, dependencies, tooling

- [ ] No console errors in DevTools
